reports.extracted_text:
Sample Medical Laboratory Report
Patient Name: Priya Sharma
Age: 24 years
Gender: Female
Date of Test: 29 April 2026
Referring Physician: Dr. Ananya Mehta
Complete Blood Count (CBC):
Hemoglobin: 12.8 g/dL (Normal: 12.0–15.5 g/dL)
WBC Count: 7,200 /µL (Normal: 4,000–11,000 /µL)
Platelet Count: 250,000 /µL (Normal: 150,000–450,000 /µL)
Blood Glucose (Fasting): 92 mg/dL (Normal: 70–99 mg/dL)
Total Cholesterol: 178 mg/dL (Desirable: <200 mg/dL)
HDL Cholesterol: 58 mg/dL
LDL Cholesterol: 96 mg/dL
Triglycerides: 118 mg/dL
Liver Function Test:
ALT: 24 U/L
AST: 22 U/L
Bilirubin Total: 0.8 mg/dL
Summary:
All parameters are within normal limits. No significant abnormalities detected. Maintain a
balanced diet, regular exercise, and routine annual health check-ups.
